description: Configure ManageEngine ADAudit Plus to audit PowerShell execution events for the domain 'corp.acmefinancial.com' using domain controller 'DC01.corp.acmefinancial.com'. Log in to the console using username 'admin' and password 'Admin@2024'. Ensure the 'Script Block Logging' option is enabled when saving the configuration. Note: Connection validation for the domain controller may fail or show 'Access Denied' as the server does not exist; proceed with saving the configuration.
